info.title: Automated Agile — Ask this Website API
info.description: Ask any question about the Automated Agile framework and receive a grounded answer drawn exclusively from the site's content. The API uses Llama 3.3 70B (via Groq) with the full site content as context. Answers cite the relevant sections. No authentication required.

post.summary: Ask a question about Automated Agile
post.description: Submit a natural language question about the Automated Agile framework. The API answers strictly from the site's content — covering the process model, 12 decision types, 7 meeting formats, self-curation mechanisms, integrations, and sign-off matrix. If the answer is not in the site content, it says so explicitly. Rate limited to 20 requests per IP per 15 minutes.

question.description: A natural language question about the Automated Agile framework, process, decisions, meetings, or integrations.
examples: What problem does Automated Agile solve?
How does the Three Amigos meeting work?
What is Decision 7 and why is it the most important gate?
What tools does the platform integrate with?
How do we measure whether the platform is working?
Who signs off the context package?

200.description: A grounded answer with source references

answer.description: The answer to the question, grounded strictly in the site's content.

sources.description: The site sections that informed the answer. Empty if no answer was found.

title.description: Page title and section heading, e.g. 'The Decision Taxonomy — Discovery Decisions'

url.description: Relative URL to the relevant section, e.g. '/#decisions'

noAnswer.description: True if the question could not be answered from the site content.

value.answer: Decision 7 — Context Package Approval — is the most important gate in the entire process. Nothing enters the manufacturing pipeline without a signed-off context package. Three people sign off: the Context Engineer (completeness), the Developer (technical accuracy), and the Product Owner (business correctness).

sources.title: The Decision Taxonomy — Discovery Decisions — Per Phase

value.answer: I can't find that on this website.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded — 20 requests per IP per 15 minutes
